{{Quote|Your distraction was most timely, allowing me nearly four extra seconds I would otherwise not have had.|Plakhmirakh to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Plakhmirakh''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] in the employ of [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization and worked closely with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker's]] many agents, most notably [[Moranda Savich]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] he was assigned to guard Savich as she delivered an information packet to Karrde on the world of [[Cejansij]]. During the delivery, Savich and the Noghri were accosted by five [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-wielding thugs; the timely intervention of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] allowed him to take down their antagonists quickly.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
